research_question: Do cloud inference endpoints cluster naturally by hardware class when measured via TTFT/TPS alone, without provider cooperation?

design.independent_variable: natural measurement noise across (time-of-day x calendar-day x endpoint)
dependent_variables: ttft_ms — time to first streamed token, milliseconds
tps — output tokens per second computed from stream timestamps
ttft_floor_ms — minimum observed TTFT per endpoint (proxy for network RTT lower bound)
tps_cov — per-endpoint coefficient of variation of TPS (variance signal)

controls.prompt_shape: single fixed shape: 'Write one paragraph (3-5 sentences) about the word: {nonce}.' nonce is one random English word per call to defeat provider response caching while keeping prompt structure identical.

validity_thresholds.endpoint_failure_handling: If any endpoint produces fewer than 150 valid (non-error, non-rate-limited) data points, that endpoint is excluded from clustering and reported as a methodology limitation. Study still publishable with reduced endpoint count if total >= 600 across remaining endpoints. If total < 600, kill_criteria.abort_if applies.

analysis.method: k-means clustering on (ttft_ms, tps) joint space, with per-feature standardization (z-score)
analysis.scoring: silhouette score per k; report inertia per k as supporting data
analysis.outlier_handling: no a-priori outlier removal; analysis script reports sensitivity to top/bottom 1% trim as a robustness check

primary_threshold.if_true: clusters_found = true. Path B (dispatch-layer HADF) green-lit.
primary_threshold.if_false: clusters_found = false. Path B not recommended. HADF stays client-device-only. Layer 2 falls back to static provider lookup.

secondary_reporting.cluster_endpoint_purity: for each cluster, the fraction of points originating from a single endpoint. >0.8 = clusters reflect endpoint identity, supporting hardware-class hypothesis.

verdict_function.mechanical_only: Verdict is a pure function of (this preregistration JSON, scripts/hadf-phase2-analyze.py output summary JSON). No judgment, no hedging, no Claude-authored framing in the case study.

banned_practices: comparison to other case studies' numbers (v5.1 3.4x, v6.0 7/9 DVs, Orchid 89%) unless straight numeric delta from a value also in this study
speculation about Path B implementation details
next-steps lists beyond the mechanical go/no-go
qualitative interpretation in the Framework Signal section
case_study_constraints.raw_data_citation_rule: every reported number must cite either (a) a value in phase2-fingerprint-summary.json with the source row count, or (b) a measurement procedure defined in this preregistration

abort_if: fewer than 600 total data points across all endpoints after the 3-day window
any endpoint changes streaming protocol or model id mid-collection (invalidates control)
kill_criteria.abort_action: Document the abort condition in the case study Methodology Notes section and publish the partial data. Do NOT silently extend or restart collection — extension would break pre-registration and the case study's independent assessability.

non_scope: Layer 0/1/2/4 runtime code — that is Path B, conditional on this study
calibrating hardware-signature-table.json — done as a separate post-study commit only if clusters_found=true
